## Source: amazon-inspector (d08a53064a76469a8b5ab4afdb3aa2907127f26f98ac8255e3ae650f8ce5d1ba)
The package cms-catalogue was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b1e5887ae48f20db99c60c5424798e9abab99d40af1c9f62074ea43ddbe9eb82)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'cms-catalogue' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
